query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `outbound_webhooks` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `project_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `url` varchar(1024) NOT NULL,
  `secret` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `events` json NOT NULL,
  `enabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_by` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `outbound_webhooks_uid_unique` (`uid`),
  KEY `idx_webhooks_project` (`project_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `webhook_deliveries` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `webhook_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `event_type` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `payload` json NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('PENDING','SUCCESS','FAILED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',
  `http_status` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `response_body` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `attempt` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `max_attempts` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,
  `next_retry_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `delivered_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `webhook_deliveries_uid_unique` (`uid`),
  KEY `idx_deliveries_webhook` (`webhook_id`),
  KEY `idx_deliveries_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_deliveries_created` (`created_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2YbtCA1K2KM9KYv.5dd22857b677 --database FxhMG2t4EnV6hSi7hwzAaR --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `outbound_webhooks` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `project_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `url` varchar(1024) NOT NULL,
  `secret` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `events` json NOT NULL,
  `enabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_by` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),

  KEY `idx_webhooks_project` (`project_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `webhook_deliveries` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `webhook_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `event_type` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `payload` json NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('PENDING','SUCCESS','FAILED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',
  `http_status` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `response_body` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `attempt` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `max_attempts` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,
  `next_retry_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `delivered_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `webhook_deliveries_uid_unique` (`uid`),
  KEY `idx_deliveries_webhook` (`webhook_id`),
  KEY `idx_deliveries_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_deliveries_created` (`created_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
